description_long: This object consists of two classic ring-shaped donuts placed side by side on a round, light-colored plate. One donut is topped with a glossy chocolate glaze and multicolored cylindrical sprinkles, while the other features a smooth pink icing with similar sprinkles. The donuts have a slightly uneven, realistic texture on their doughy surfaces, with visible puffiness and subtle browning around the edges. The chocolate-glazed donut partially overlaps the pink-iced donut, creating a casual, inviting arrangement. The sprinkles are distributed unevenly, adding a playful and appetizing visual detail. The plate is simple and unadorned, serving as a neutral backdrop that highlights the vibrant colors and textures of the donuts.
description: Two donuts, one with chocolate glaze and one with pink icing, both covered in colorful sprinkles, rest on a plain round plate.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing mostly the chocolate-glazed donut with sprinkles, with the pink-iced donut partially visible underneath.
description_view_1: A side view revealing both donuts clearly, with the chocolate donut in front and the pink donut behind, both covered in sprinkles.
description_view_2: A rear view focusing on the pink-iced donut in the foreground and the chocolate donut behind, highlighting the icing and sprinkle details.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite angle, showing the pink donut in front and the chocolate donut behind, both with visible sprinkles.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze on one donut, pink sugar icing on the other; both are smooth and glossy with a slightly uneven application.
